Get countries that can receive health care data from Iceland

parameters.name: locale
parameters.description: The locale to use for the response

get.description: Get user's most recent EU patient consent with change history. Returns consent null and empty history if none has ever been created.

parameters.name: locale
parameters.description: The locale to use for the response

post.description: Create a new EU patient consent for a patient

put.description: Deactivate the active EU patient consent for the current user

get.description: Get the current user's conversations, ordered by most recent activity. Defaults to active (non-archived, non-deleted); use ?status= to override and ?starred= to filter by star.

parameters.name: status
parameters.description: Filter by patient-side status. 'active' (default) excludes archived/deleted. 'archived' returns only archived. 'all' returns both active and archived (deleted is always excluded).

post.description: Create a new patient-initiated conversation with an initial message and optional attachments.

get.description: Get a single conversation by id, including the full message thread and attachment metadata.

Stream an attachment from a message in the patient's conversation thread. When the message carries a gated certificate (HEILSUVERA + merchant config) that hasn't been paid for, responds 402 with `{ resourceType, resourceId }` the FE can use to start a payment intent.

post.description: Append a patient reply to an existing conversation.

patch.description: Mark a conversation as read by stamping patientLastReadAt = now().
Archive a conversation. Hides it from the patient's default inbox view; remains accessible via ?status=archived.
Move an archived conversation back to the active inbox.
Remove the star from a conversation.

get.description: List the healthcare providers the patient can send messages to, with effective per-HCP messaging settings and allowed conversation types.

parameters.name: locale
parameters.description: Locale for conversation-type titles and descriptions. Defaults to is.

get.description: Fetch a payment intent the patient owns. FE polls this after browser-return from the payment page until status becomes SUCCEEDED.
Get a single issued certificate by id, including whether it requires payment and whether it has been paid for.

post.description: Open a payment intent for a paid certificate.

get.description: Stream the certificate PDF. Returns 402 with `{ resourceType, resourceId }` when the cert is gated behind an unpaid payment.

scopes.@landlaeknir.is/health: Scope for accessing health data for the authenticated user

type.description: A URI reference that identifies the problem type

title.description: A short, human-readable summary of the problem type

detail.description: A human-readable explanation specific to this occurrence of the problem

instance.description: A URI reference that identifies the specific occurrence of the problem.

prescriptionId.description: The prescription gateway ID (idByGateway). For users without a medcard, falls back to the stringified internal DB id.

nodeId.description: Hekla nodeId of the recipient. Defaults to the patient primary care.

groupId.description: Hekla groupId of the recipient. Defaults to the patient primary care sagaGroupId.

CommissionType.description: The type of commission. 0 is deliver, 1 is deliver and information.

UserType.description: The type of user that registered the commission. 0 is parent, 1 is person, 2 is doctor, 3 is pharmacist.

toNationalId.description: The national ID of the person receiving the commission

toName.description: The name of the person receiving the commission

commissionType.description: The type of commission. 0 is deliver, 1 is deliver and information.

validFrom.description: The start date and time the commission becomes valid. If not defined, the commission is instantly valid.

validTo.description: The end date and time the commission is valid until. If not defined, the commission is valid until canceled.

comment.description: Explanation of commission change. If commission is made inactive, an explanation should be included.

userType.description: The type of user that registered the commission. 0 is parent, 1 is person, 2 is doctor, 3 is pharmacist.

toNationalId.description: The national ID of the person receiving the commission

commissionType.description: The type of commission. 0 is deliver, 1 is deliver and information.

validFrom.description: The start date and time the commission becomes valid.

validTo.description: The end date and time the commission is valid until.

sender.description: Name of the sender of the questionnaire

senderGroupName.description: Name of the sender group of the questionnaire

numSubmissionsAllowed.description: Number of submissions allowed for the questionnaire, null if unlimited

numSubmitted.description: Number of submissions (not drafts) for the questionnaire

lastCreatedSubmissionId.description: The Id of the latest submission created can either be a draft or a final submission

lastSubmitted.description: The date when the questionnaire was last submitted (not when a draft was saved)

nextSubmissionDate.description: Earliest next submission date when daysBetweenReplies > 0; omitted if never submitted or no cooldown

htmlLabel.description: used if label needs to use some html tags like, <b>, <u>. This replaces the label property.

active.description: If false, the question is not shown, used to deprecate questions

visible.description: If false, the question is not shown unless it is triggered

multiselect.description: Will be deprecated in the future, use minSelections and maxSelections instead if provided

htmlLabel.description: used if label needs to use some html tags like, <b>, <u>. This replaces the label property.

active.description: If false, the question is not shown, used to deprecate questions

visible.description: If false, the question is not shown unless it is triggered

htmlLabel.description: used if label needs to use some html tags like, <b>, <u>. This replaces the label property.

active.description: If false, the question is not shown, used to deprecate questions

visible.description: If false, the question is not shown unless it is triggered

triggerId.description: The id of the question that triggers the trigger

targetId.description: The id of the target question that the trigger is applied to

visible.description: Whether the target question is visible

value.description: The value the triggering question must have for the trigger to be applied to the target question

contains.description: comma seperated list, e.g. "1,5,8" trigger runs when one value is selected

containsAll.description: comma seperated list, e.g. "1,5,8" trigger runs when all values are selected

sender.description: Name of the sender of the questionnaire

senderGroupName.description: Name of the sender group of the questionnaire

numSubmissionsAllowed.description: Number of submissions allowed for the questionnaire, null if unlimited

numSubmitted.description: Number of submissions (not drafts) for the questionnaire

lastCreatedSubmissionId.description: The Id of the latest submission created can either be a draft or a final submission

lastSubmitted.description: The date when the questionnaire was last submitted (not when a draft was saved)

nextSubmissionDate.description: Earliest next submission date when daysBetweenReplies > 0; omitted if never submitted or no cooldown

canSubmit.description: Boolean field to check if the questionnaire can be submitted

submissions.description: Submissions for the questionnaire both drafts and final submissions

submissionId.description: Id of the questionnaire submission (draft or final)

canSubmit.description: Boolean field to check if the questionnaire can be submitted

address.description: Street name, number, direction & P.O. Box etc.

type.description: Assignee type. PERSON assignees are surfaced under practitioners, not here.

modality.description: Whether the appointment is in person or over video

assignees.description: Non-person assignees (role, room, equipment, service, other). PERSON assignees appear under practitioners.

organization.description: The organization the location belongs to

address.description: Street name, number, direction & P.O. Box etc.

postalCode.description: The postal code of the address

phoneNumber.description: Contact phone number for the location

openingHours.description: The opening hours of the location

links.description: Typed links associated with the location

startTime.description: The start time of the appointment

endTime.description: The end time of the appointment

modality.description: Whether the appointment is in person or over video

description.description: The brief description of the appointment

patientInstruction.description: Patient facing information about the Appointment

links.description: Typed links associated with the appointment

assignees.description: Non-person assignees (role, room, equipment, service, other). PERSON assignees appear under practitioners.

consent.description: The most recent consent, or null if none has ever been created

isArchived.description: True when the patient has archived this conversation from their inbox.

unread.description: True when there is a message newer than the patient last-read marker.

certificateId.description: Set when this message has an issued certificate attached. FE follows this id to the certificate download endpoint.

requiresPayment.description: True when the attached certificate is gated behind a successful payment. Combine with `paid` to decide whether to render a 'pay to download' affordance.

paid.description: True when the attached certificate has been paid for. Only meaningful when `requiresPayment` is true.

amountIsk.description: Price the patient would be charged, in ISK. Populated only when `requiresPayment` is true.

isArchived.description: True when the patient has archived this conversation from their inbox.

patientCanReply.description: Whether the patient is allowed to reply on this conversation. Null when no staff has set it yet — replies are allowed unless explicitly false.

unread.description: True when there is a message newer than the patient last-read marker.

contentType.description: Declared MIME type. Server verifies the declared value against the bytes via a magic-byte check and rejects on mismatch.

isCertificate.description: True for certificate-request types (POST /me/certificates); false for regular messages (POST /me/conversations).

isCurrentlyWithinWindow.description: True when the current UTC time is within the messaging window.

recipientName.description: Name the certificate is addressed to. Employer for work, school for school.

endDate.description: ISO date (YYYY-MM-DD). Must be on or after startDate.

isAutomatic.description: True when the request was submitted as an automatic certificate request.

requiresPayment.description: True when the HCP charges patients for this certificate and the cert is gated behind a successful payment.

paid.description: True when the certificate has been paid for.

amountIsk.description: Price the patient would be charged, in ISK. Populated only when `requiresPayment` is true.

returnUrl.description: FE-owned URL the gateway redirects the patient's browser to after a successful charge. Forwarded to the gateway as PaymentSuccessfulURL.
